name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        \/ /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i), ![RIGHT(i)] = RIGHT(i)]

(* Invariant: fork ownership *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N |-> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div i*CHUNK_SIZE \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(file)))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, [i \in 1..Len(chunks) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(chunks, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(chunks)))] )
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E k \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![k] = offsets[k] + (clocks[j] - clocks[k])]
        /\ \E l \in 1..N \ {i, j} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![l] = offsets[l] + (clocks[k] - clocks[l])]
        /\ \E m \in 1..N \ {i, j, k} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![m] = offsets[m] + (clocks[l] - clocks[m])]
        /\ \E n \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![n] = offsets[n] + (clocks[m] - clocks[n])]
        /\ \E o \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![o] = offsets[o] + (clocks[n] - clocks[o])]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* No other state changes *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
